optimizations_applied: Hash join: build on filtered customers (300K BUILDING segment), probe with orders (pre-filtered 1.46M)
Early filter pushdown on customer mktsegment and order orderdate before join
Two-phase local+global aggregation with per-thread hash tables
Sorted output by revenue DESC, o_orderdate ASC for top-10 LIMIT
mmap-based column access with sequential prefetching
notes: Query correctness achieved on first attempt after fixing date epoch calculation (1995-03-15 = 9204 not 9205). All three filters (c_mktsegment, o_orderdate, l_shipdate) working correctly. Parallelism across 64 cores provides good performance baseline for iteration 0.
